system_instruction: You are an expert Python data engineer and demographer. Create a Python script to generate a simulated CSV dataset.

output_requirements.batching: Compile results into files for each 5-year period

1_Age.description: Newborn up to 100 years. Median Age: 24.7 years. Youth percentage (<25 yrs): >51%. Dependency ratio: Moderate (~2 working adults per 1 dependent).

dataset_schema_and_rules.2_Year_of_Birth: Calculated based on simulation year and age
dataset_schema_and_rules.3_Year_of_Death: Simulated based on mortality rates and age
dataset_schema_and_rules.6_Income_per_year: Calculated using the specified socio-economic salary reference websites
dataset_schema_and_rules.7_Residence_site: Specific zone/district in the New Capital
dataset_schema_and_rules.9_Real_estate_ID: الرقم القومي للعقار (National Real Estate ID)
dataset_schema_and_rules.19_Gas_consumption_monthly_m3: Average per month in cubic meters
dataset_schema_and_rules.24_Transportation_type: Includes modern facilities like flying taxis, monorail, LRT
dataset_schema_and_rules.26_Food_consumption: Estimated food consumption metrics per household
dataset_schema_and_rules.27_Future_Predictive_Fields: Include dynamically generated fields useful for predictive analysis and sustainable development modeling
